message:
feat(tui): extract process detail widget into dedicated module

- Create process_detail.rs widget for rendering detailed process info
- Update widgets/mod.rs to export the new process_detail module
- Refactor app.rs detail pane rendering to delegate to the new widget
- Refine process_table widget with additional accessor methods

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
